---
title: "{title}: annotations"
bibliography: {study}.bib
#nocite: '@pethes_war_2006'
# tables:
#   - tbl_qa: {file: "qa.qmd", num: 1}
#   - tbl-summary: {file: "results.qmd", num: 2}
title-meta: ""
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'

---

<!-- {{< include _vars.qmd >}} -->

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true

qa<-c("Wie KI unsere Sprache","yakura-llm")
qa<-"{paper}"
tdf<-read.csv("{study}-{paper}-qa.csv")

m1<-tdf$paper==qa[1]

kdf<-data.frame(id=which(m1),annotations=tdf$a[m1])

#knitr::kable(kdf)

```

## notes on 
paper: 
@{paper}   


```{r}
#| label: tbl_qa1
#| tbl-cap: "{paper}: annotations"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true

# qa<-c("Wie KI unsere Sprache","yakura-llm")
# qa<-"lit-ki"
# tdf<-read.csv("qa.csv")

# m1<-tdf$paper==qa[1]

# kdf<-data.frame(id=which(m1),annotations=tdf$a[m1])

knitr::kable(kdf)

```
